Debuggable , DebugListener , Derivable , Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Moveable , Nameable public class LEDMatrix extends TypedAtomicActor An actor that displays an array of LEDs. The array display only one color, red. This

s. The array display only one color, red. This actor has two inputs, row and column which are integers that identify the row and column of the LED to possibly be illuminated and a control input which determines whether the LED is illuminated or
